name: Eggnog Bread
recipeInstructions: I adapted a recipe from my food processor bread book for the eggnog bread. Here's what I did; you may need to make adaptations based on your bread maker model. If it looks too sticky, add flour one tablespoon at a time. If it's too dry, add liquid also one tablespoon at a time. Place ingredients in the bread maker according to your manufacturer's directions. Adjust by adding flour or liquid as needed. This makes a moist, light large loaf that rises to the top of most bread makers. Use the SWEET BREAD cycle and set the button slightly lighter than the center mark (adjust according to your model). Let me know your results!
